summary: Completed comprehensive testing of warnings system and WO lifecycle changes. Backend: all 34 tests passed. Frontend: 20+ tests passed covering login page public buttons, warning dialog behavior, WO kanban/table views, breakdowns/warnings toggle, operator/admin auto-WO checkbox visibility, and control room regression.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/warnings (authenticated) creates warning WRN-xxx, machine status becomes 'watch', WO auto-created and assigned
Backend: POST /api/public/warnings (no auth) works with reporter_name, submitted_via=public_kiosk
Backend: GET /api/warnings lists warnings with items and total
Backend: WO lifecycle - tech complete -> PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE, tech close -> 403, admin close -> CLOSED
Backend: Operator breakdown forces auto_create_work_order=true even if false sent
Backend: Admin breakdown respects auto_create_work_order=false
Backend: Admin closing warning-sourced WO restores machine from watch to running
Frontend: Login page shows public Breakdown button with cracked gear icon
Frontend: Login page shows public Warning button (yellow)
Frontend: Warning dialog does NOT close on outside click (correct behavior)
Frontend: Work Orders page defaults to kanban view
Frontend: Work Orders kanban has ADMIN CLOSURE column
Frontend: Work Orders kanban - machine names are plain text (not clickable)
Frontend: Work Orders table - machine names are plain text (not clickable)
Frontend: Breakdowns page has Report Warning button
Frontend: Breakdowns page has Breakdowns/Warnings view toggle
Frontend: Warnings table displays with WRN tags
Frontend: Warnings table shows PUBLIC badge for kiosk submissions
Frontend: Operator login - Report Breakdown shows auto-WO note (no checkbox)
Frontend: Admin login - Report Breakdown shows auto-WO checkbox
Frontend: Machine drawer has Report Breakdown and Report Warning buttons in Breakdowns tab
Frontend: Control Room loads without errors
Frontend: Repair page has elapsed downtime, root cause, action taken fields

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (20/21 tests passed - 1 test skipped due to no OPEN breakdowns available for Start Repair navigation test)
